title: ventia standleyana
intro: Ventia standleyana, also known as Ventia, is a plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is native to Peru and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential in lowering blood pressure. Ventia standleyana can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
